title: Add discounts, upsells, and optional items
excerpt: [Add discounts](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/discounts.md): Reduce the amount charged to a customer by discounting their subtotal with coupons and promotion codes. [Configure free trials](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/free-trials.md): Offer customer free trials on subscriptions. [Configure subscription upsells](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/upsells.md): Enable customers to upgrade their subscription plan at checkout by using upsells. [Add optional items](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/optional-items.md): Enable customers to purchase complementary products at checkout by using optional items.…
